confidence_rationale: Video shows practice phases and final result, but actual task execution details are limited. Knot failure clearly indicated by on-screen text. Suture mark placement cannot be assessed from available views.
cannot_determine: Exact suture placement relative to marks - marks not clearly visible
Detailed knot tying sequence - limited view of actual task execution
Hand switching between throws - task execution not fully shown
technique_summary: Fast completion time suggesting expert-level skill, but knot failure indicates technical execution issues. Practice phases show good instrument control.
strengths: Good instrument control during practice phases
improvement_suggestions: Focus on knot security - ensure proper tension and locking technique
Practice knot tying fundamentals to prevent slippage
Verify knot integrity before considering task complete
